sections.title: VERY LONG TEST CONTENT
sections.content: This is an extremely long paragraph to test if the box properly expands to fit all content without scrollbars. Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. More content to ensure the box stretches properly. Testing multiple lines and paragraphs to see how the box adapts. The box should keep growing vertically to accommodate all this text. No scrollbars should appear. The border lines should adjust accordingly. This is continuous testing content to demonstrate the dynamic height adjustment feature.
